name: Pumpkin Bread with Cinnamon
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Grease 3 medium (8 1/2 x 4 1/2) loaf pans and sprinkle a little brown sugar in each.
3. In a large bowl, combine all the dry ingredients and make a well in the center.
4. Add the 4 eggs and salad oil to the dry mixture.
5. Pour in the water and pumpkin, then beat thoroughly until well mixed.
6. Stir in the raisins and nuts.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
8. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until a cake tester or wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Allow to cool for 5 minutes in the pans before turning onto wire racks to cool.
